label: Grease & Gears Pak
blurb: Automotive Repair, Dealerships & Mobile Mechanics. Bay-turnover speed, parts arbitrage, and upselling transparency.

skills.label: Tire Tread Depth Upsell Generator
skills.method: Takes the mechanic's 4/32-inch tread measurement, texts the customer a photo of the bald tire alongside a 3-tiered quote (Good, Better, Best) for replacements.
trigger_examples: closes tire sales while the car is still on the lift

skills.label: Obd2 To Plain English Translator
skills.method: Ingests the raw P0420 code from the diagnostic scanner and generates a simple text to the customer explaining what a catalytic converter does and why it costs $800 to fix.

skills.label: Oem To Aftermarket Parts Matcher
skills.method: Scrapes NAPA, AutoZone, and O'Reilly APIs to find the cheapest, fastest-delivered exact-fit aftermarket alternator for a specific VIN.
trigger_examples: saves service advisors 20 minutes on hold with local parts desks

skills.label: Fleet Maintenance Mileage Predictor
skills.method: Tracks daily usage of local plumbing/HVAC vans, automatically scheduling an oil change and tire rotation for a Saturday morning so the van doesn't miss billable weekday hours.
trigger_examples: keeps commercial fleets on the road making money

skills.label: Dealership Lease Expiration Nag
skills.method: Checks the CRM for customers whose 36-month leases are expiring in 90 days, sending a personalized offer on the newest model of their exact car.
trigger_examples: automates the most lucrative dealership retention channel

skills.label: Mobile Detailer Weather Rescheduler
skills.method: Monitors local radar; if rain is predicted for a 2 PM outdoor ceramic coating appointment, it automatically texts the client to reschedule to a sunny day.
trigger_examples: prevents ruined work and wasted trips

skills.label: Body Shop Supplement Filer
skills.method: Takes photos of hidden damage found after the bumper is removed, automatically drafting the supplement request and submitting it to Geico/State Farm for approval.

skills.label: Tow Truck Dispatch Triage
skills.method: Parses distressed texts ("My car died on I-95 South"), drops a GPS pin, categorizes as a flatbed vs. hook requirement, and routes the nearest available driver.

skills.label: Warranty Claim Labor Time Biller
skills.method: Cross-references the mechanic's actual punched hours against the manufacturer's strict "book time" to maximize the warranty reimbursement claim submitted to Ford/Toyota.
trigger_examples: plugs massive revenue leaks in dealership service centers

skills.label: Junkyard Inventory Cross Reference
skills.method: Catalogs an incoming wrecked 2015 Honda Civic, mapping every salvageable part to the Hollander Interchange manual, and auto-listing them on eBay Motors.
trigger_examples: turns scrap metal into highly organized e-commerce inventory
